name: Custom Dashboard Agent (Lite)
author: Treasure AI FDE Team
license: Proprietary - Treasure Data has all rights
description: Build or resume custom HTML dashboards from Treasure Data using a 5-phase self-serve pipeline. No Confluence, no git — everything local. Routes to Non-Workflow (Score 0-2) or Workflow (Score 4-6) based on requirements.
long_description: A complete 5-phase dashboard development pipeline for Treasure Data customers. Includes requirements gathering, data discovery, workflow deployment (optional), interactive dashboard building, automation & AI agent deployment (optional), and handoff documentation. Supports both ad-hoc and production workflows with local state management.

claude_model.note: Balanced cost/performance. Works with all Claude models (Haiku 4.5, Sonnet 5, Opus 4.7/4.8); Sonnet is the best default.

special_features.custom_text_option: All single-select questions support 'Other' for custom input
special_cases: Sisense/Treasure Insights .dash migration with fast-track conversion
Treasure Insights API-based datamodel schema fetch
special_features.brand_theming: Official Treasure AI 2026 colors with custom brand override support
special_features.phase_skipping: Phase 2 optional based on Score; Phase 4-5 always optional

use_cases.title: Ad-Hoc Sales Analytics Dashboard
use_cases.description: Quickly build a non-workflow dashboard for one-time sales analysis without scheduling costs

use_cases.title: Production Revenue Dashboard
use_cases.description: Build a scheduled workflow dashboard for daily revenue tracking across regions

use_cases.title: Sisense Migration to Modern Stack
use_cases.description: Migrate existing Sisense/Treasure Insights dashboard to portable HTML with cross-validation

use_cases.title: Executive KPI Dashboard with AI Companion
use_cases.description: Build a dashboard with automated daily refresh and conversational AI analysis

2.0.0: Official Treasure AI 2026 brand colors with complete palette
Multi-select Setup-E with support for all 3 resource types (.dash, datamodel, workflow)
Combined resources path for cross-validation of .dash + datamodel
'Other' custom text option on all single-select questions
Multi-select on 15+ applicable questions (platforms, dimensions, exclusions, etc.)
Treasure Insights API integration with live schema extraction
Comprehensive color documentation with accessibility compliance
